arts.ttl: Real Madrid announce squad for Champions League match against Arsenal

arts.ttl: Jude Bellingham's England issue, why dressing room were glad he left, Real Madrid bust-up
arts.sum: Jude Bellingham will look to play a starring role for Real Madrid as they try to overturn a 3-0 deficit against Arsenal on Wednesday night, having reportedly clashed with a team-mate in the build-up

arts.ttl: Real Madrid fans to display bizarre chess tifo against Arsenal - with seven-word message to inspire a comeback at the Bernabeu
arts.sum: Real head into the second leg at the Bernabeu with a three-goal deficit to overturn after Declan Rice led Arsenal to an emphatic victory at the Emirates last week.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid vs Arsenal – Match preview and team news
arts.sum: Arsenal travel to Real Madrid in the Champions League quarter-finals tonight in possession of a three-goal advantage. The winners of tonight’s tie will face Paris Saint-Germain in the next round after they knocked out Aston Villa yesterday evening. arts.ttl: Vinicius Jr sends two-word Arsenal message ahead of Real Madrid Champions League quarter-final
arts.sum: Real Madrid star Vinicius Junior has hinted that he is ready to try and lead the comeback against Arsenal in the Champions League quarter-final second leg. Earlier in the week both Jude Bellingham and Vinicius Jr started looking ahead to the game against Arsenal .

arts.ttl: Arsenal sent clear Champions League warning ahead of showdown against Real Madrid
arts.sum: Now, ahead of Wednesday's quarter-final between Real Madrid and Arsenal, Hakimi has warned both teams that PSG are growing in confidence after their recent performances in the competition. Achraf Hakimi has warned Arsenal and Real Madrid that Paris Saint-Germain are confident of winning the Champions League after reaching the semi-finals for the fourth time in six seasons.

arts.ttl: Arsenal player not short of offers – Multiple factors leading to Gunners exit
arts.sum: Atlético Madrid have Arsenal’s Thomas Partey in their target list for the summer window, according to Wednesday’s edition of Marca. Mikel Arteta has used Partey as a defensive midfielder and a right-back, and he played 45 games so far this season.
